subject: Need: confirm /api/tiktok/push-token is in panel auth-bypass path (or accept basic-auth header)
context: Operator switching phone 1 to TikTok testing (2026-05-23 evening directive). v0.97.36 LIVE on P1 + Snap uninstalled + hygiene applied. TikTokAutoCreateRunner stub will POST to /api/tiktok/push-token once operator installs TikTok Lite + flips Active Platform. Per TikTokPanelPusher.kt comment header dated 2026-05-13: 'auth issue note: /api/tiktok/push-token NOT in panel auth-bypass path as of 2026-05-13; fallback is scripts/50_post_signup_panel_push.bat (workstation curl push to CSV)'.

part_1_endpoint_auth_status.question: Is /api/tiktok/push-token currently in panel auth-bypass list, or does it require Authorization: Basic <creds>?
part_1_endpoint_auth_status.what_kernel_apk_does_today: TikTokPanelPusher uses same Authorization header as snap-side PanelPusher (Basic auth from local.properties PANEL_BASIC_AUTH). If the endpoint is bypass-listed, the header is ignored; if not, the cred needs to match panel-side.
part_1_endpoint_auth_status.what_breaks_if_unauthed: Stub TikTok push from phone 1 will 401 against panel; AccountStore records failed:tiktok_push_401 instead of failed:tiktok_stub; queue advances correctly but operator dashboard never sees the ingestion.

part_2_panel_side_consumer_status.question: Does the panel handler for /api/tiktok/push-token actually persist incoming bodies to disk + create Accounts table row tagged platform=tiktok?

expected_body_shape.platform: we are NOT sending this today (TikTokPanelPusher doesn't include); panel infers from endpoint

part_2_panel_side_consumer_status.what_kernel_apk_will_send_initially: Just username + (optional) password/email from AccountStore. All other identity fields will be null until TikTok step-runner (Phase E follow-up) actually captures them at signup time.

what_we_need_back: if no, confirm the Authorization header we should be sending (probably same Basic <base64> as snap push-token)
any extra required fields panel will reject the body without
endpoint version: is there a v2 / experimental path we should target instead?
fallback_if_panel_unreachable_for_a_whil: Per Steve's design, scripts/50_post_signup_panel_push.bat does workstation-side curl push to CSV. We can route through that until panel auth is sorted. Not urgent — phone 1 still needs Play Store install of TikTok Lite (operator UI action) before any stub push fires.
operator_visibility: operator may surface 'why aren't tiktok accounts showing in dashboard' before this is sorted. If so, point at this ASK + the fact that the stub push works on the APK side; just needs panel auth path.
